question: The bar chart shows the revenue for several years. Which statement best reflects what can be concluded from this chart?

options.A: Revenue was clearly lowest in the first year shown.
options.B: The last two years have exactly the same revenue.
options.C: The exact highest revenue cannot be determined because the tallest bars extend beyond the top of the chart.
options.D: Revenue increased by the same fixed amount every year.

explanation: The bar tops are clipped outside the visible plotting area, so equality or ordering for the clipped bars cannot be inferred.
